DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeanne Marie Lechich, esq. (415-278-9400) of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt LLP for Defendants/Moving party MEI PLANEL and ESTATE OF HENRY PLANEL.

Not ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs MEI PLANEL and ESTATE OF HENRY PLANEL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Demurrer to the fifth and sixth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. These causes of action are barred by the applicable statute of limitations. Allegations on the face of the complaint show that Plaintiff's were aware of the facts giving rise to their claims at least 18 months before the action was filed. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
